title: PrettyRealistic PBR
description: Strives to make Minecraft "Pretty Realistic", but faithful to the original Minecraft feel.
body:
### What Does It Do? This Pack adds PBR and some POM textures to your world to make it feel and look more realistic.

If you enjoy what you see, come join [My Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/CaspersTextures) or [My Ko-fi Page](https://ko-fi.com/casperstextures) and [Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/pXXCewPBhe) for 'Work in progress' and textures up to 512x!


### **------- HOW TO USE -------**
_**I recommend**_ you use what I did making it, to have the most reliable results. ##### _However you can use what you want / prefer. **Just make sure it supports PBR!**_ See below or look at my [About Page](https://www.patreon.com/c/casperstextures/about) on Patreon for more detail. **INSTALL:**
[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) _(to run shader packs) it should also helps your Minecraft run smoother. [allegedly]_ **SHADER PACKS:**
use **IterationRP** Shader or [HRR 2.1](https://www.patreon.com/posts/45141775) to get the result as seen in images above (remember to turn on Raytracing!)
For better performance, shaders like: '[BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders)' or '[Complementary Shaders](https://www.complementary.dev/shaders/)' works great too!
